home.title: 文档中心
home.description: SVC+ 云原生控制平面产品指南与使用文档。
home.html: 欢迎来到 SVC+ 官方文档中心。在这里您可以找到关于平台各个核心领域的详细指南与 API 参考。

collections.title: Xworkmate/Ai-workspace
collections.description: AI 核心链路域，涵盖 App LiteLLM、OpenClaw、QMD 等智能代理与模型路由调度。

collections.title: Xstream Platform
collections.description: AI加速代理私有网络互联，涵盖 Caddy、Xray 隧道观测代理与同步节点。

collections.title: Open-platform
collections.description: 开源解决方案，涵盖 IAC，DevOPS、安全、IAM (Zitadel) 以及全局可观测性的平台解决方案。

home.title: Documentation
home.description: SVC+ Cloud-Native Control Plane product guides and documentation.
home.html: Welcome to the official SVC+ documentation center. Here you can find detailed guides and API references for all core domains of the platform.

collections.title: Xworkmate/Ai-workspace
collections.description: AI Core Link Domain covering App LiteLLM, OpenClaw, QMD & model routing.

collections.title: Xstream Platform
collections.description: Private AI network interconnect covering Caddy, Xray tunnels, and Vector agents.

collections.title: Open-platform
collections.description: Open-source solutions covering Gitea, Vault, IAM, and global observability stack.
